title: Claude Code now supports artifacts
preview: Starting today, Claude Code can capture work progress as an artifact, which turn Claude Code's work into live, shareable visual pages— including PR walkthroughs, system explainers, dashboards, and release checklists—that update themselves as your session works.

title: Centrally manage authorization for MCP connectors
preview: Admins can now provision MCP connectors for their whole organization through their identity provider, starting with Okta. Users get connector access automatically on first login, with authorization configured centrally by their organization.

title: Secure access to the Claude Platform with Workload Identity Federation
preview: Workload Identity Federation (WIF) is now generally available on the Claude Platform. WIF is compatible with any OIDC-compliant identity provider and covers all Claude API endpoints, including when accessing the endpoints through our first-party SDKs and Claude Code.

title: Claude Design now stays on brand for daily work
preview: Claude Design now sticks to your design system across projects, works fluidly with Claude Code, lets you edit directly on the canvas, and connects to more tools you already use. It has a new home in the sidebar on the Claude desktop app; you can also find it at claude.ai/design.

title: The evolution of agentic surfaces: building with Claude Managed Agents
preview: As model intelligence and agentic harnesses evolve, Claude Managed Agents allows teams to build and deploy agents in production environments reliably at scale. Here's why and how teams are using it.

title: New in Claude Managed Agents: run agents on a schedule and store environment variables in vaults
preview: Starting today, Claude Managed Agents can run on a schedule and securely access CLI tools and other authenticated services. Both features are now available in public beta on the Claude Platform.

title: Building intelligent apps for Apple platforms with Claude in the Foundation Models framework
preview: Today we're releasing Foundation Models framework support for Claude through a new Swift package that lets Apple developers use Apple's Foundation Models framework to call Claude for more complex workflows.

title: How one Anthropic seller rebuilt his team's workflows with Claude Code
preview: *Before he joined Anthropic, Jared Sires, GTM product manager, had never opened a terminal. Now Anthropic's Sales team uses his tools.*

title: The Claude Cowork product guide
preview: Most AI tools are conversational. You ask a question, you get an answer, and the work of turning that answer into something useful—a deck, a doc, a spreadsheet, an email—is still manual.

title: Running an AI-native Engineering Org
preview: At Code w/ Claude SF 2026, Director of Engineering for Claude Code and Claude Cowork Fiona Fung walked through how the team's processes and structure changed once agentic coding became the default way of working.

title: Lessons from building Claude Code: How we use skills
preview: Skills have become one of the most used extension points in Claude Code. They're flexible, easy to make, and easy to distribute.

title: How CodeRabbit used Claude to build an agent orchestration system
preview: CodeRabbit built a layer on Claude that sits between a coding request and a coding agent, producing a structured coding plan the team can review before any code gets generated.

title: Using LLMs to secure source code
preview: We share best practices for how you can work with Claude Opus to build a threat model, discover vulnerabilities in your codebase, then verify, triage, and patch them.

title: New connectors in Claude for everyday life | Claude
preview: Today we're expanding what you can connect to Claude. Alongside the work tools you already use, you can now connect the apps you use throughout your week, including AllTrails, Instacart, Audible, Tripadvisor, Intuit TurboTax, and more.

title: Preparing your security program for AI-accelerated offense
preview: AI is changing the speed at which vulnerabilities are found and exploited. We're publishing an initial set of recommendations to shore up your defenses based on our own findings and security practices.

title: Scaling Managed Agents: Decoupling the brain from the hands
preview: Harnesses encode assumptions that go stale as models improve. Managed Agents—our hosted service for long-horizon agent work—is built around interfaces that stay stable as harnesses change.

title: Claude now creates interactive charts, diagrams and visualizations
preview: Update: Now available in Claude Cowork on all paid plans (April 22, 2026).
